basic_details.organization_name: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology (RGIPT)
basic_details.post_name: Public Relations Media Administration & Industry Connect Executive
basic_details.short_information: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology (RGIPT) has released the official Executive Notification 2026 at the official website. Has been announced under the RGIPT Executive Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a qualification of Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Management / Mass Communication / Public Relations / Journalism / Marketing or related field along with 2-5 years of relevant experience can apply through Email on or before 07 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Management / Mass Communication / Public Relations / Journalism / Marketing
qualification.details: Executive : Bachelor's or Master's degree in Management / Mass Communication / Public Relations / Journalism / Marketing or related field. Minimum 2-5 years of relevant experience in PR, media relations, administration, industry liaison, or in the relevant field. Experience in educational institutions, government or the corporate sector is preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RGIPT Executive Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
